snippet: 「漢光演習」是中華民國國軍從1984年起每年舉行的全國性軍事演習，目的在於落實作戰計畫與部隊戰力，包括陸、海、空與後備動員等多項實兵演練。

title: 2025「漢光演習」各縣市演習時間、防空避難指引完整指南
snippet: 今年的「漢光41號演習」期間，將進行「2025城鎮韌性演習」。過去針對防空與救援分別實施的萬安演習及民安演習，2025年起，整併為「城鎮韌性演習」，全台22個直轄市、縣（市）兩年一輪序方式實施。 · 「城鎮韌性演習」最大特色為「無腳本」進行，設備在接獲指令後才部署到場，模擬真實情境下的應變。此演習更貼近實際災變，強調資源整備與即時動員，目在提升地方政府的危機應對能力，確保戰時社會與民生運作不中斷。

title: Vice Adm. Joe Buzzella Assumes Command of USCG Pacific Area and Defense Force West - marinelink.com
snippet: The U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) held a formal assumption of command ceremony for Vice Adm. Joe Buzzella as he assumed the duties and responsibilities of U.S. Coast Guard Pacific Area and Defense Force West Commander during an event Thursday, at Coast Guard Island in Alameda. Vice Adm. Buzzella formally assumed the responsibilities of commander, Coast Guard Pacific Area, overseeing all Coast Guard operations across the Pacific theater—an area encompassing more than 74 million square miles. title: Ammo hub puts pinoys in line of fire: U.S. aims for regional supply chain security - Daily Tribune
snippet: The United States is seeking to increase the Philippines’ stake in the ongoing geopolitical conflict by announcing plans for a new ammunition production facility in the country as part of a broader strategy to strengthen military manufacturing across the Indo-Pacific region.
